message:
fix(hook): Add path hash to project names for cache affinity uniqueness

The previous `extract_project_name()` returned only the directory basename,
causing cache affinity collisions when multiple projects shared the same
directory name (e.g., two different "app" directories at different paths
would compete for the same worker cache slots).

Now compute a blake3 hash of the absolute path and append the first 8 hex
characters to the project name (e.g., "app-1a2b3c4d"). This ensures:

- Projects with identical basenames get distinct cache keys
- Cache affinity still works (same project always gets same hash)
- Human-readable prefix remains for debugging
- Minimal overhead (blake3 is extremely fast)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
